title: phleum parviceps
intro: Phleum parviceps, also known as false chess or small timothy grass, is a type of grass species that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phleum parviceps include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support digestive health. The herbal preparations of Phleum parviceps include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
